commit.message:
feat: range picker Bling, GestaoInsumos e AutomacaoCadastro

Bling v2:
- RangePicker com dois calendários + presets (Hoje, Ontem, 3 dias,
  7 dias, 15 dias, Este mês, Personalizado) — igual ao Bling ERP
- Padrão ao carregar: últimos 3 dias
- Backend: /bling/pedidos aceita ?dataInicio=&dataFim= além de ?data=
- Hover preview do range durante seleção personalizada

Novos módulos (criados pelo usuário):
- GestaoInsumos: gestão de insumos/embalagens com CRUD e reposição
- AutomacaoCadastro: cadastro automático de produtos por EAN
- useInsumos: hook para API de insumos
- AppShell: rotas insumos e catalogo/automacao adicionadas
- App.jsx: rotas /expedicao/insumos e /catalogo/automacao registradas

commit.message:
fix(inference): revert llama-cpp-rs to crates.io stable (0.1.141)

The git fork with updated llama.cpp submodule causes wrapper_oai.cpp
build failures due to API incompatibility. Reverted to stable crates.io
version. Gemma 4 GGUF support requires llama-cpp-rs >= 0.1.142 which
has not been released yet.

Tested: Gemma 3 4B and Qwen 0.5B work correctly with current backend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: fix StableHLO lowering — not exactly 1:1

Some StdTensorOp → StableHLO mappings require 1:N expansion:
- Conj → real + imag + negate + complex (1:4)
- SVD/QR → custom_call + get_tuple_element (multi-output)
- Solve → getrf + getrs (1:2+)
- Dup → eliminated during materialize_merge (0)
- ReduceSum → reduce with add combiner sub-computation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

/api/historyにメモリキャッシュ+ダウンサンプリング追加

コネクションプール枯渇(33本上限)を修正:
- 60秒メモリキャッシュでDBクエリを大幅削減
- Raw SQLで最大300ポイントにダウンサンプリング
- Cache-Controlヘッダー追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add StableHLO IR representation, custom_call, and backend dispatch

- StableHloProgram/StableHloOp/StableHloInstruction as own Rust structs
- No serialization for faer/GPU backends (in-process Rust struct passing)
- XLA backend: xla-rs builder API (programmatic, no text/binary)
- IREE (future): only path that needs MLIR text serialization
- custom_call for linalg (SVD, QR, LU full pivot, etc.) and user kernels
- Backend custom_call registry for extensible kernel dispatch

commit.message:
検索特化モデル gpt-4o-mini-search-preview に対応

- Chat Completions API + web_search_options を使う検索特化モデルに対応
- gpt-4o-mini-search-preview をデフォルトに変更（最速・最安）
- gpt-4o-search-preview も選択可能
- モデルに応じてAPI(Chat Completions/Responses)を自動切替
- レスポンス形式を統一し、citations変換処理を追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: unify standard backends through StableHLO interpretation

All standard algebra backends now go through StableHLO lowering:
- FaerBackend: StableHLO interpreter (op-by-op, faer/BLAS/LAPACK)
- CustomGpuBackend: StableHLO interpreter (op-by-op, CUDA)
- XlaBackend: StableHLO → JIT compile

No separate "CompiledProgram direct interpreter" path for standard
algebra. v1 faer/LAPACK kernels are reused as StableHLO op handlers.
Custom algebra backends still interpret CompiledProgram directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Symlink auth.json into isolated XDG_DATA_HOME for provider activation

When isolate_db=True (default), the temp XDG_DATA_HOME lacked auth.json,
causing providers authenticated via `opencode auth` (e.g. minimax-cn) to
fail with "Model not found". Now symlinks the original auth.json into
the isolated directory so DB isolation works without breaking provider auth.

Bump version to 0.1.3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- 20 conda env files (envs/): 5 CUDA × 4 Python versions
- tools/build-local.sh: build wheels locally with conda (no Docker)
- Updated CLAUDE.md with both build methods documented
- Updated spconv submodule: cumm dep aligned to >=0.8.2, <0.9.0

commit.message:
fix: replace browser prompt() with inline token modal

Removes the native browser prompt dialog for GitHub PAT entry.
Adds a clean modal overlay with password input, Cancel, and Save & Refresh buttons.
Token is saved to localStorage on first entry; subsequent refreshes use it silently.
On 401, clears the stored token and re-shows the modal.

commit.message:
fix: Zeitzone-Fehler beim Stempeln beheben (#26)

Backend sendet jetzt naive UTC-Datetimes mit 'Z'-Suffix (ISO 8601),
damit Flutter sie korrekt als UTC erkennt. Flutter parst alle
Zeitstempel mit .toLocal(), sodass die Anzeige in der Geräte-Zeitzone
(Europe/Berlin) korrekt ist.

commit.message:
feat, fix: smart retry/heal logic and run reports

- feat: intelligent error classification — transient (timeout, network) retries same code, structural (selector, assertion) triggers healing
- feat: readValueNear() utility — finds numeric values near labels automatically, handles label/value DOM separation
- feat: parseNumber() upgraded — finds largest number in text, handles all formats
- feat: detailed run reports — per-step narrative with errors for failed attempts and durations for passed attempts
- feat: healing summary persisted to DB (healing_summary JSONB on test_runs) — shows in historical runs
- feat: "Healed" badge on historical runs that were auto-fixed
- fix: multi-step test structure in prompts — separate test() blocks, no cross-step state via process.env
- fix: flexible assertions — range checks instead of exact values for blockchain operations
- fix: before/after comparisons in same test block to prevent retry delta doubling
- fix: agent delete updates client state immediately
- fix: ANSI escape codes stripped from all error displays
- fix: 5 max attempts, Playwright retries disabled (runner handles all retry logic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: WebSocket-Token aus URL entfernen, Authentifizierung per erster Nachricht (#9)

JWT-Tokens wurden als URL-Parameter übertragen und damit in Server-Logs,
Browser-History und Proxy-Logs gespeichert. Nach dem WebSocket-Handshake
wird der Token jetzt als erste JSON-Nachricht gesendet:
{"action": "auth", "token": "<JWT>"}

Betroffene Dateien:
- backend/app/api/chat.py: Endpoint /ws/{token} → /ws, accept() vor Auth
- frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: Token aus URL entfernt, onopen sendet Auth-Msg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(security): Mitgliedschaftsprüfung im WebSocket-Handler ergänzen (#10)

_create_message prüft nun vor dem Speichern, ob der Absender Mitglied
der Konversation ist. Nicht-Mitglieder erhalten None zurück und die
Nachricht wird weder gespeichert noch weitergeleitet. Damit wird der
IDOR-Angriffsvektor über den WebSocket-Pfad geschlossen.

Test in tests/test_chat_security.py verifiziert beide Fälle.

DEPARTMENT_MANAGER und TEAM_LEADER durften bisher alle Mitarbeiterdaten
einsehen (Broken Access Control). Die Prüfung war als Platzhalter
implementiert und immer True zurückgegeben.

Jetzt wird per DB-Abfrage sichergestellt, dass diese Rollen nur
Mitarbeiter der eigenen Abteilung einsehen können.

commit.message:
fix: restore osascript primary path on macOS 26 — delivers banner notifications

UNUserNotificationCenter hard-denies non-notarized apps on macOS 26 regardless
of signing identity. osascript via System Events delivers proper banner
notifications with no extra setup on macOS 26+. ClaudeNotifier.app is kept for
macOS 25 and earlier where UNUserNotificationCenter works.

commit.message:
fix: Interne Fehlermeldungen nicht mehr an Clients zurückgeben (#13)

HTTP-500-Antworten enthielten bisher str(exc), was Datenbankdetails,
Dateipfade und interne Strukturen preisgeben konnte (Information
Disclosure). Der globale Exception-Handler gibt jetzt nur noch eine
generische Meldung zurück; die vollständige Fehlermeldung wird
weiterhin serverseitig geloggt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Complete rank-2 TID: COLLIER B₀ fallback for IR-divergent B₀(0,0,0)

The massless QED box has sub-triangle C₁/C₂ integrals that require
B₀(0,0,0) — IR-divergent in D=4. Fix: fall back to COLLIER's b0_coli_
which handles dim-reg natively, returning the finite MS-bar remainder.

All 33 interference terms now evaluate (6 rank-0 + 21 rank-1 + 6 rank-2).
Direct box at √s=100 GeV, cosθ=0.5: finite ComplexF64 result.

Ref: Denner1993 Eq. (4.23), B₀ in dim-reg
Ref: COLLIER b0_coli_ (src/COLI/coli_b0.F)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
